meaning: v.比...长命,比...耐久,渡过...而存在,经受住
examples: I'm sure Rose will outlive many of us.
But nowadays women outlive men by about five to six years.
Their story, and the lessons we derive from it, will long outlive them.
What nobody could predict was that the new threat would long outlive the old one.
Reality stars, unlike their scripted counterparts, outlive their shows, and sometimes find ways to defy them.
